.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.2.25 .1.3.6.1.2.1.92
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.1 The MIB module for managing multiple logical entities.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.2 This MIB module defines Entity MIB extensions for physical sensors.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.3 The MIB module for representing multiple logical entities supported by a single SNMP agent.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.4 The MIB module to manage a CMC-III PU using the private Rittal MIB.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.5 The MIB module for SNMP entities containing all RFC1213 MIB-II groups.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.6 The MIB module to manage host systems.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.7 The MIB module to describe generic objects for network interface sub-layers.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.8 The MIB module for entities implementing the IPv6 protocol.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.9 The MIB module for logging SNMP Notifications (traps and informs).
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.10 The MIB module for Link Layer Discovery Protocol (LLDP) configuration, statistics, local system entry and remote systems entry components.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.11 The LLDP Management Information Base extension module for TIA-TR41.4 media endpoint discovery information.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.12 The LLDP Management Information Base extension module for PROFINET organizationally defined discovery information.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.13 The LLDP Management Information Base extension module for IEEE 802.1 organizationally defined discovery information.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.14 The LLDP Management Information Base extension module for IEEE 802.3 organizationally defined discovery information.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.15 The MIB module for managing physical topology information.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.16 The MIB for Message Processing and Dispatching.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.17 The management information definitions for the SNMP User-based Security Model.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.18 The SNMP Management Architecture MIB.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.19 The MIB module for SNMPv2 entities
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.20 View-based Access Control Model for SNMP.
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.21 The MIB module for managing TCP implementations
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.22 The MIB module for managing IP and ICMP implementations
.1.3.6.1.2.1.1.9.1.3.23 The MIB module for managing UDP implementations
